title: Invalid character in JSON key during XML conversion
symptom: When attempting to convert JSON to XML, an error 'Invalid character in name' is thrown. This occurs due to a space in one of the JSON key names.
not_this_if: JSON keys do not contain spaces
Error occurs in a different context
root_cause: The XML conversion process requires that all key names in the JSON object adhere to XML naming rules. Spaces in key names are not allowed, leading to the 'Invalid character in name' error during conversion.
fix_steps: Identify the JSON key with a space (e.g., 'OS Name')
Rename the key to remove the space (e.g., 'OS_Name')
Retry the JSON to XML conversion
agent_instruction: Rename any JSON keys that contain spaces to valid XML key names and attempt the conversion again.
